quoteLast: the Scharnhorst, whose flag remained flying to the last, suddenly listed heavily to port, and within a minute it became clear that she was a doomed ship, for the list increased very rapidly until she lay on her beam ends. At 4.17 P. M. she disappeared. The Gneisenau passed on the far side of her late flagship, and continued a determined, but ineffectual, effort to fight the two battle cruisers. At 5.08 P. M. the forward funnel was knocked over, and remained resting against the second funnel. She was evidently in serious straits, and her fire slackened very much.
title: History of the World War
author: March, Francis A., Jr., 1863-1928; Beamish, Richard J. (Richard Joseph), 1867-1945

quoteFirst: Johannesburg was able to track Mariner until
quoteLast: because, as the trajectory took Mariner almost radially away from the Earth, our planet began in effect to turn away from under the spacecraft.
title: Mariner Mission to Venus
author: Jet Propulsion Laboratory (U.S.)

title: The Lord of the Sea

title: Mike

quoteFirst: But when Fogson, your rival, makes
quoteLast: ,               And Three after Three,     And next a grand drive, that adds six to his score,               Right over the tree,     Bell's eyes with excitement delightedly flash--               She praises his pluck!
title: Cricket Songs
author: Gale, Norman, 1862-1942

At 4.17 P. M. she disappeared. The Gneisenau passed on the far side of her late flagship, and continued a determined, but ineffectual, effort to fight the two battle cruisers. At 5.08 P. M. the forward funnel was knocked over, and remained resting against the second funnel. She was evidently in serious straits, and her fire slackened very much.
title: History of the World War, Volume 2 (of 7)
